rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 5, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. rulings.Case Title: GERALD R. WILMOT et al VS. ACE HARDWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 5, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant Dana Companies LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Wilmot was exposed to asbestos-containing friction gaskets attributable to defendant. Plaintiffs¿ objections to the declarations of Ms. Duncan and Mr. Agosti are sustained. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GERALD R. WILMOT et al VS. ACE HARDWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: For B.R. Funsten & Co.'S Motion For Summary Judgment
